citation.description: show_ticket API confirmed all six child stories (4e19, 7c84, e7e0, fde0, 46f0, a3db) have status=closed with completion-verifier signatures.

criteria.criterion: After this epic, a freshly-run plan-review and code-review each write a *_v2 sidecar whose payload contains every pass-1 finding across all buckets with its pass-2 verification, its pass-3 validity/impact/priority/decision/reason, the resolved numeric block_threshold, and the pass-4 coaching. Oracle: an integration test runs a review and asserts on the emitted event JSON.
A completion-verification PASS emits a per-criterion audit record. Oracle: a test asserting on the emitted completion event.

The audit read layer returns the full retained history for a ticket and its relates_to-linked code reviews. Oracle: an integration test seeding a ticket's histories and asserting the aggregate contains all of them.
